creator: fuz@FreeBSD.org
text: @GrahamPerrin Note that by marking this bug as "open", you have succeeded in kicking it off the "needs triage" list, meaning that possibly nobody is ever going to look at it again (as it doesn't have a maintainer-approved patch and nothing to time out).  Is this really the intent?  You really shouldn't set random bugs to "open" without being sure that they are filed somewhere people look.
